active-esim-step: For the abnormal state of eSIM, you need to reactivate it. Click the button below to reset the eSIM.

esim-state.disabled-toast: Currently using an external SIM card and cannot activate it

giveaway-tip: It is detected that the device is currently using an external SIM card. Since the data plan only supports eSIM, eSIM needs to be reactivated after purchase to take effect. Do you want to continue purchasing?

operator-switch.back-tip: You can return to the service settings page to perform the replacement again.
operator-switch.fail-desc-1: The red light of the device is always on and the signal is too weak. Please check whether the antenna has been installed, or adjust the position and direction of the device and try again.
operator-switch.fail-desc-2: The eSIM network service operator has poor local signal.
operator-switch.fail-desc-3: You must complete the network reset and wait for the device to emit the corresponding prompt tone.
operator-switch.fail-label-1: 1. The network signal is not smooth
operator-switch.fail-label-2: 2. The service provider’s network is unstable
operator-switch.help-options-1: 1. Quickly click [Reset] 3 on the device and wait for the device to issue a [eSIM reset successful, device is restarting] prompt, that is, resetting eSIM is completed.
operator-switch.help-options-2: 2. After waiting for the device to complete restart, click the [Next] button below.
operator-switch.loading: Network service operator is switching, please wait patiently...
operator-switch.timeout-retry: Operator group switching timed out, please try again later.

opt-guid.list-label: Current regional network service operator list ({0})

opt-support-tip: Only support the device owner to change the network service operator
opt-support-tip-1: The current eSIM status does not support changing the network service operator
opt-support-tip-2: External card does not support changing the network service operator
reset-fail: The network service provider configuration failed, please try again
reset-network-help: If the eSIM state is in (in use) state and the 4G traffic service is in (in service) state, then the second step is not required.
reset-options-1: 1. If the current network is unstable, you can prioritize checking whether the antenna has been installed or adjusting the position and direction of the equipment. If the problem still cannot be solved, then perform the next operation.
reset-options-2: 2. Reset the network, that is, clear the current network configuration information, reconfigure the network service provider, and click the button below to start entering the reset network and distribution process.
reset-tip-1: 1. Please do not exit during the distribution network process, otherwise there may be no information about the Internet service provider!
reset-tip-2: 2. If you exit midway due to inevitable circumstances, you can return to the current page and follow the steps to reconfigure.
switch-esim-step-1: Step 1: Unplug the external SIM and restart the device
switch-esim-step-2: Step 2: Click the button below to reset the eSIM
use-sim-tip-suffix: Currently using external SIM, click to
